untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This is a risk management philosophy/entry condition requirement about evidence collection and hypothesis validation. It describes when a trading concept is valid enough to trade (entry conditions: min 100 confirming examples, min 100 disconfirming examples, 80% win rate, 3 documented failure modes), but contains no instruction on HOW TO SIZE positions (no risk percentage, no Kelly calculation, no volatility scaling, no drawdown adjustment, no position scaling multiplier).
